Annotation.String: UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)
UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)
Projection View for MM Safe Stock

PropertyValue.EnumMember: SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/AND SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/OR SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/NOT SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/group SAP__cap+ abilities.SearchExpressions/phrase
